data.title: Global iPhone 17 sale surge could push Apple past Samsung for first time since 2011
data.description:
Apple is about to end a 14-year losing streak to Samsung. In 2025, the iPhone maker is on track to ship 243 million units, while Samsung is expected to push out 235 million, according to Counterpoint Research. That would give Apple a 19. 4% share of the global smartphone market. Samsung would slide to 18. 7%, the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/iphone-17-could-push-apple-past-samsung/

data.title: Struggling to sleep? You’re not alone – How Bitcoin’s recent price crash is affecting other traders IRL
data.description:
Bitcoin’s recent slide below $80,000 has triggered a wave of sleep disruption across the retail trading community, according to a new report from CEX. io. The flagship digital asset has since rebounded to about $88,000, but the roughly 31% drawdown from its recent peak left many investors monitoring prices through the night
source: https://cryptoslate.com/bitcoins-recent-decline-fuels-sleep-nights-among-traders/

data.title: 440,000 fewer EVs predicted after UK imposes mileage tax on plug‑ins and EVs
data.description:
The UK government just confirmed it’s going after EV drivers’ wallets. Starting April 2028, electric vehicle and plug-in hybrid owners will pay a per-mile tax under new budget plans aimed at closing a future revenue gap. The Office for Budget Responsibility expects the change to erase about 440,000 EV sales over time, as fully electric […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/440000-fewer-evs-predicted-uk/

data.title: Bitcoin Reaches $90,000 Once Again: What Could be Next?
data.description:
Bitcoin briefly broke through the $90,000 barrier today, reclaiming a key psychological level before sellers pushed the price back down toward the $89,700–$89,800 range at the time of writing. The move highlights a market still wrestling with volatility, where sharp breakouts are often met with equally sharp reversals.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitcoin-reaches-90000-once-again-what-could-be-next/

data.title: Cardano’s Recovery Stalls, but TVL Growth Signals Could Spark Year-End Upside
data.description:
Cardano (ADA) is once again dealing with an unstable market stretch as its price hovers near one-year lows, but renewed optimism is building ahead of December’s long-awaited Midnight launch. Related Reading: The Bull And Bear Scenario For XRP That Could Play Out In November Despite persistent criticism over declining network usage and shrinking DeFi liquidity, fresh technical signals and upcoming ecosystem catalysts suggest the blockchain may be preparing for a recovery phase into year-end. ADA's price trends to the downside on the daily chart
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/cardano/cardanos-recovery-stalls-but-tvl-growth-signals-could-spark-year-end-upside/

data.title: Shiba Inu Rockets on 1.36T Volume Spike as Bulls Absorb Panic Selling — Here Is Why This Bounce Matters
data.description:
The Shiba Inu cryptocurrency has experienced a dramatic surge in value, soaring due to an impressive trading volume spike of 1.36 trillion. This increase in trading activity has been primarily driven by bullish investors who have stepped in to absorb the panic selling that occurred recently. Understanding the significance of this bounce is crucial, as it reflects not only the resilience of the Shiba Inu community but also the potential for future price movements in the volatile cryptocurrency market. In this article, we will explore the reasons behind this notable rebound, the implications for investors, and what this might mean for Shiba Inu's trajectory moving forward.
source: https://blocknews.com/shiba-inu-rockets-on-1-36t-volume-spike-as-bulls-absorb-panic-selling-here-is-why-this-bounce-matters/

data.title: Ethereum Reclaims $3,000 as Bullish Signals Emerge Despite Extreme Fear
data.description:
Ethereum has climbed back above the $3,000 threshold, staging a convincing recovery after several days of choppy trading. The move comes at a time when overall market sentiment remains deeply negative, Ethereum’s Fear & Greed Index sits at 15 (Extreme Fear) and only 40% of November’s trading days have been green.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/ethereum-reclaims-3000-as-bullish-signals-emerge-despite-extreme-fear/

data.title: Tether Becomes the Largest Independent Holder of Gold — Here Is What That Means for Crypto
data.description:
Tether has officially emerged as the largest independent holder of gold, a significant milestone that could have profound implications for the cryptocurrency market. This development not only underscores Tether's commitment to backing its stablecoin with tangible assets, but it also raises questions about the future relationship between traditional commodities and digital currencies. The impact of this event may influence investor confidence in cryptocurrencies, shift market dynamics, and potentially stabilize the value of Tether’s stablecoin, especially during times of economic uncertainty. As Tether’s gold reserves grow, it may also lead to increased scrutiny from regulators and spark new discussions about the integration of gold and cryptocurrency in a modern financial ecosystem. Here is a closer look at what this means for the future of crypto and the interplay between these two asset classes.
source: https://blocknews.com/tether-becomes-the-largest-independent-holder-of-gold-here-is-what-that-means-for-crypto/
